sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { Clock, BookOpen, Users, Star, Play, Award, Target, FileText, Scale, Eye, Lock, AlertTriangle, ChevronDown, ChevronUp, CheckCircle, Circle, PlayCircle, Headphones, MessageSquare } from 'lucide-react'; const EnhancedScenarioDetail = () => { const navigate = useNavigate(); const [expandedSections, setExpandedSections] = useState({ caseOverview: true, characters: false, evidence: false, timeline: false }); const toggleSection = (section: keyof typeof expandedSections) => { setExpandedSections(prev => ({ ...prev, [section]: !prev[section] })); }; // Scenario data const scenario = { title: 'The Inventory That Changed Everything', subtitle: 'First-Time Bail Application – Theft Offense', description: 'A sales executive is accused of theft after a valuable laptop goes missing during an inventory check. As defense counsel, interview your client, analyze evidence, and build a compelling bail application.', difficulty: 'Intermediate', duration: '30-40 minutes', rating: 4.7, reviewCount: 32, completionRate: 68, // Interactive stages preview stages: [ { id: 1, name: 'Client Interview', duration: '10-15 min', icon: '👤', description: 'Meet Rajesh Kumar in custody and gather his version of events', skills: ['Active Listening', 'Rapport Building', 'Fact Gathering'], completed: false }, { id: 2, name: 'Evidence Analysis', duration: '8-12 min', icon: '🔍', description: 'Review CCTV footage, inventory logs, and digital records', skills: ['Critical Thinking', 'Pattern Recognition', 'Legal Research'], completed: false }, { id: 3, name: 'Bail Application Draft', duration: '5-8 min', icon: '📝', description: 'Prepare written bail application citing relevant precedents', skills: ['Legal Writing', 'Precedent Citation', 'Argumentation'], completed: false }, { id: 4, name: 'Court Hearing', duration: '12-18 min', icon: '⚖️', description: 'Present oral arguments before the magistrate', skills: ['Oral Advocacy', 'Quick Thinking', 'Professional Conduct'], completed: false } ], characters: [ { name: 'Rajesh Kumar', role: 'Client (Accused)', age: 28, avatar: '👤', personality: 'Anxious but cooperative, honest, family-oriented', keyFacts: [ 'Sales executive for 4 years', 'Wife and 2-year-old daughter', 'No criminal record', 'Claims charger mistaken for laptop' ], interactionType: 'AI Conversation', voiceEnabled: true }, { name: 'Hon\'ble Justice Sharma', role: 'Presiding Magistrate', age: 58, avatar: '👨‍⚖️', personality: 'Strict but fair, precedent-focused, impatient with poor preparation', keyTraits: [ 'Values legal accuracy', 'Interrupts irrelevant arguments', 'Appreciates structured submissions', 'Expects proper court address' ], interactionType: 'AI Conversation', voiceEnabled: true }, { name: 'Public Prosecutor', role: 'State Counsel', age: 45, avatar: '⚔️', personality: 'Methodical, evidence-focused, opposes bail systematically', keyArguments: [ 'CCTV shows accused with object', 'High-value theft (₹45,000)', 'Investigation ongoing', 'Employee breach of trust' ], interactionType: 'AI Conversation', voiceEnabled: false }, { name: 'Prakash Mehta', role: 'Witness (Colleague)', age: 34, avatar: '👨', personality: 'Honest, supportive of Rajesh, cautious about involvement', testimony: 'Was present during inventory but didn\'t see what went into bag', interactionType: 'Optional Interview', voiceEnabled: false } ], evidenceItems: [ { id: 1, name: 'CCTV Footage', type: 'video', icon: '📹', description: 'Hallway camera shows Rajesh placing rectangular object in bag', quality: 'Low resolution, high angle', available: true, critical: true }, { id: 2, name: 'Digital Inventory Log', type: 'document', icon: '📊', description: 'Laptop marked "dispatched to service center" at 9:47 AM', anomaly: 'No service ticket exists', available: true, critical: true }, { id: 3, name: 'Access Records', type: 'document', icon: '🔑', description: 'Employee entry/exit logs for storage room', available: true, critical: false }, { id: 4, name: 'Phone Charger', type: 'physical', icon: '🔌', description: 'Rajesh\'s black charger in hard plastic case', available: false, critical: true } ], timeline: [ { time: '9:12 AM', event: 'Manager Desai enters storage room alone', suspicious: true }, { time: '9:47 AM', event: 'Laptop marked "dispatched" in digital log', suspicious: true }, { time: '10:45 AM', event: 'Inventory check begins', suspicious: false }, { time: '11:03 AM', event: 'Rajesh enters storage with Prakash', suspicious: false }, { time: '11:17 AM', event: 'Rajesh exits (CCTV captures bag incident)', suspicious: false }, { time: '2:00 PM', event: 'Laptop reported missing', suspicious: false }, { time: 'Oct 16, 7:30 AM', event: 'Rajesh arrested at home', suspicious: false } ] }; const handleStartSimulation = () => { navigate('/courtroom', { state: { scenarioId: '1', scenarioTitle: scenario.title } }); }; return (
{/* Back Button */} {/* Hero Section - Enhanced */}

{scenario.subtitle}

{scenario.description}

{stage.description}

{/* Skills */}

{skill}
))}

Unlocks in sequence
))}
{/* Main Content */}
{/* Interactive Characters - NEW */}
{expandedSections.characters && (
{scenario.characters.map((char, idx) => (

{char.name}

{char.role}
{char.age && (
Age: {char.age}
)}

{char.personality}

Key Facts:

{fact}
))}
)} {char.keyArguments && (
Will Argue:
{char.keyArguments.map((arg, argIdx) => (
{arg}
))}
)}
{char.interactionType}
))}
)}
{/* Evidence Items - Enhanced */}
{expandedSections.evidence && (
{scenario.evidenceItems.map((item) => (
{item.icon}

{item.name}

{item.type}
{item.critical && ( CRITICAL )}

{item.description}

{item.anomaly && (
{item.anomaly}
)}
{item.available ? '✓ Available to review' : '✗ Not yet available'}
))}
)}
{/* Timeline - NEW */}
{expandedSections.timeline && (
{/* Timeline line */}
{scenario.timeline.map((event, idx) => (
{event.time}

{event.event}

{event.suspicious && ( SUSPICIOUS )}
))}
)}
{/* Sidebar - Streamlined */}
{/* Quick Stats */}

Scenario at a Glance

Difficulty {scenario.difficulty}
Duration {scenario.duration}
Stages {scenario.stages.length} Interactive
AI Characters {scenario.characters.filter(c => c.interactionType.includes('AI')).length}
{/* Actions */}

{/* Tips */}

💡 Success Tips

  • • Build rapport with client first
  • • Look for timeline inconsistencies
  • • The truth is in the details
  • • Address judge respectfully
); }; export default EnhancedScenarioDetail;
